Power Rangers (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $85,364,450Details
International Box Office $57,167,102
Worldwide Box Office $142,531,552
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,003,307
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,368,332
Total $15,371,639
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A group of ordinary high school kids find themselves infused with extraterrestrial powers and must harness those powers as a team to save the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$40,300,288 (47.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,693 opening theaters/3,693 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $113,819,266

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 24th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: June 13th, 2017 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi violence, action and destruction, language, and for some crude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2463 (Cert #50875), 2/15/2017)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: Power Rangers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Reboot, Slow Motion Scene, Training Montage
Plot point: Alien Encounters, Betrayal, Bullies, Car Accident, Football, House Arrest, LGBTQ+, Mecha, Medical and Hospitals, Origin Story, Prank Gone Wrong, Robot, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: High School Sports
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Temple Hill Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
